message: fix(ffs-journal): count incomplete replay txns by sequence

files.patch:
@@ -612,6 +612,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-dn1hf","title":"[HIGH] ffs-core btrfs root-tree and readdir tests now fail on CRC32C checksum mismatch","description":"# Review finding

Workspace gate `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenfs_cod cargo test --workspace --all-targets` currently fails 10 `ffs-core` tests that all unwrap the same parser error: `Format("invalid field: tree_block_csum (CRC32C checksum mismatch)")`.

## Failed tests
- `tests::open_fs_from_btrfs_image`
- `tests::open_fs_btrfs_debug_format`
- `tests::open_fs_btrfs_superblock_accessor`
- `tests::open_fs_btrfs_walk_root_tree`
- `tests::walk_btrfs_dir_entry_items_includes_dir_index_items`
- `tests::btrfs_readdir_mixed_types`
- `tests::btrfs_readdir_empty_directory_returns_dot_dotdot`
- `tests::btrfs_readdir_sorted_by_index`
- `tests::btrfs_readdir_offset_pagination`
- `tests::btrfs_readdir_special_characters_in_names`

## Failure sites
- `crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs:22693`
- `crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs:22711`
- `crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs:22723`
- `crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs:22736`
- `crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs:23342`
- `crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs:23365`
- `crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs:23388`
- `crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs:23409`
- `crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs:23442`
- `crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs:23489`

## Why this is high severity
This is a workspace-red regression in core synthetic btrfs coverage. It breaks basic `OpenFs::from_device()` and `readdir()` expectations for internal fixtures, so new btrfs behavior cannot be trusted until the checksum stamping / parser-validation mismatch is resolved.

## Repro
`rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenfs_cod cargo test --workspace --all-targets`

## Expected fix direction
Audit recent btrfs fixture builders or validation-path changes so synthetic root-tree and dir-index blocks have checksums stamped consistently with current parser verification.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-22T07:47:51.099879377Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-22T20:34:08.975670287Z","closed_at":"2026-04-22T20:34:08.973372486Z","close_reason":"Already shipped; targeted ffs-core root-tree and readdir repros now pass","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["btrfs","ffs-core","qa","review","workspace-gate"]}

 {"id":"bd-dofky","title":"add mounted-path ext4 symlink occupied-destination EEXIST and non-directory-parent ENOTDIR coverage","description":"Survey finding: ext4 mounted-path FUSE E2E proves symlink create/readlink success, but it does not freeze the public refusal contract for creating a symlink over an existing name or beneath a regular-file parent even though ffs-core already returns Exists and NotADirectory. Scope: add ext4 mounted-path probes that assert exact EEXIST for occupied destinations and ENOTDIR for non-directory parents, with no stray entries or inode leaks after rejection. Acceptance: fuse_e2e freezes ext4 symlink creation refusal behavior for existing names and non-directory parents.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T09:28:22.355545253Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-22T05:26:00Z","closed_at":"2026-04-22T05:26:00Z","close_reason":"Stale in-progress sweep: no commit reference after more than 12 hours; closed per operator instruction so the work can be re-filed or reclaimed cleanly.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"bd-du187","title":"Fix JBD2 replay incomplete transaction accounting","description":"ReplayStats::incomplete_transactions currently subtracts committed sequence count from pending transaction count. That undercounts when orphan commit blocks coexist with incomplete pending descriptors because the counts can cancel out even though the pending sequence was never committed. Count pending sequence IDs that are absent from the committed set instead, and add a regression test.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-28T09:02:02.816535714Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-28T09:07:16.698257328Z","closed_at":"2026-04-28T09:07:16.696358632Z","close_reason":"Fixed JBD2 replay incomplete transaction accounting and added orphan-commit regression coverage.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
